name: @habib/hakim
description: Hakim foundation tooling for evidence-bound minimalist coding intelligence.

scripts.check:evidence-script: node --check scripts/hakim_doctor.mjs && node --check scripts/hakim_install_plan.mjs && node --check scripts/hakim_host_preflight.mjs && node --check scripts/hakim_codex_launch.mjs && node --check scripts/hakim_claude_launch.mjs && node --check scripts/hakim_copilot_install.mjs && node --check scripts/hakim_copilot_remove.mjs && node --check scripts/check_public_repository_boundary.mjs && node --check scripts/check_public_package_surface.mjs && node --check scripts/build_native_plugin_package.mjs && node --check packaging/native-plugin/hakim-cli.mjs && node --check packaging/native-plugin/opencode-plugin.mjs
scripts.audit:ci: mkdir -p dist && python core/hakim-skill/scripts/audit_complexity.py core/hakim-skill/scripts --intensity full --output json > dist/audit.json || test $? -eq 1
scripts.package:skill: mkdir -p dist && python core/hakim-skill/scripts/package_skill.py --source core/hakim-skill --output dist/hakim-skill.zip && python scripts/verify_package.py dist/hakim-skill.zip
scripts.package:release: npm run package:skill && npm run release:checksums && npm run release:checksums:verify
scripts.test:public: npm run test:public:js && npm run test:public:py
scripts.test:public:js: node tests/test_rule_copies.js && node tests/test_rule_missing_section.js && node tests/test_plugin_smoke.js && node tests/test_opencode_plugin.mjs && node tests/test_hakim_opencode_lifecycle.mjs && node tests/test_native_plugin_realpath_containment.mjs && node tests/test_claude_diagnostic_hook.js && node tests/test_upstream_relationship.js && node tests/test_hakim_pr_guardian.mjs && node tests/test_hakim_review_pr.mjs && node tests/test_hakim_doctor.mjs && node tests/test_hakim_install_plan.mjs && node tests/test_hakim_host_preflight.mjs && node tests/test_hakim_codex_launch.mjs && node tests/test_hakim_claude_launch.mjs && node tests/test_hakim_copilot_install.mjs && node tests/test_hakim_copilot_remove.mjs && node tests/test_cross_adapter_conformance.js && node tests/test_generate_conformance_packets_no_git.js && node tests/test_structured_metadata.js && node tests/test_hakim_guarded_session.mjs && node scripts/check_public_repository_boundary.mjs && node scripts/check_public_package_surface.mjs
scripts.test:integration:js: node tests/test_rule_copies.js && node tests/test_rule_missing_section.js && node tests/test_plugin_smoke.js && node tests/test_opencode_plugin.mjs && node tests/test_hakim_opencode_lifecycle.mjs && node tests/test_native_plugin_realpath_containment.mjs && node tests/test_claude_diagnostic_hook.js && node tests/test_upstream_relationship.js && node tests/test_hakim_pr_guardian.mjs && node tests/test_hakim_review_pr.mjs && node tests/test_hakim_doctor.mjs && node tests/test_hakim_install_plan.mjs && node tests/test_hakim_host_preflight.mjs && node tests/test_hakim_codex_launch.mjs && node tests/test_hakim_claude_launch.mjs && node tests/test_hakim_copilot_install.mjs && node tests/test_hakim_copilot_remove.mjs && node tests/test_cross_adapter_conformance.js && node tests/test_generate_conformance_packets_no_git.js && node tests/test_structured_metadata.js && node tests/test_hakim_guarded_session.mjs && node scripts/check_public_repository_boundary.mjs && node scripts/check_public_package_surface.mjs
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:integration:js && npm run test:public:py
